Notice Hearing On Verified Petition To Establish Identity Of Persons In Chain Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RRE: PETITIONER NANCY YUM's Verified Petition To Establish Identity Of Persons In Chain Of Title To Real Property.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
